title: Kannukulla Vandhu Lyrics Kadalai
stanzas:
Kadalai Kannukkulla Vandhu Song Lyrics
Singer: Sam CS & Nincy
Music: Sam CS
Lyrics: Sam CS & Ma Ka Pa Anandh

kannukulla vandhu
sikkuriye pennaee
kanavukulla vandhu
nikkuriye kannae
nenjukuli adha
pikkuriye yeh yeh
sollu penne

sokkupadi vachchi
sokkuriye penne
pithu pudikka
vaikkuriye kanne
enna vetkapada
vaikkuriye yeh yeh
sollu penne

aasa raasaathi unmela
aasa unnodu naan pesa
aasa kayyodu kaikorthu
poga aasa aasa

kannukulla vandhu
sikkuriye pennaee
kanavukulla vandhu
nikkuriye kannae
nenjukuli adha
pikkuriye yeh yeh
sollu penne

kanden una naanu
kannae nee venum
nee illaatti nenjam
ippa vedichidum

muje thumse piyaar hai
jiaa mae karaaru hai
meraa sappnaa piyaari piyaari
kuchchu kuchchu hotha hai

o.. nilaa kaayum neram
manasukulla baaram
neeyum oru parva paarthaa
theerum theerum

aasa raasave unmela
aasa unthozhil naan saaya
aasa in kaigal naan kaikorthu
poga aasa aasa (2)

nee pesum pechchum
seiyum kurumbum
veli sollaama enakulla
rasikkuren

nee paakkaadha pod
unpinbam paarthu
ennulla unna konja
thiththikuren

neelum india jenmam
neeyum inga venum
kaalam theerndhu pogudhunnaa
saabam kooda unnodu venue

kanaa kaana vendum naane
kadhaigal solla venum
onnaa serndha vazhkai
mattum podhum

kannukulla vandhu
nikkuriye anbe
nenjukulikulla sikkuriye
inga
unna nenaikka vaikkuriye
yeh yeh
naan maaripponen.
maaripponen ..

aasa raasave unmela
aasa unthozhil naan saaya
aasa in kaigal naan kaikorthu
poga aasa aasa (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kannukulla Vandhu?

The song is a romantic melody that captures the essence of love and joy.

Who is the singer of Kannukulla Vandhu?

Sam CS is the singer of this beautiful track.

What is the context of the song in the movie Kadalai?

The song appears in a romantic setting, highlighting the blossoming love between the lead characters.

Who composed the music for Kannukulla Vandhu?

The music was composed by Sam CS.

When was the song Kannukulla Vandhu released?

The song was released in 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kannukulla Vandhu from the movie Kadalai is a romantic duet that beautifully captures the emotions of love and longing. Sung by Sam CS, the melody is both enchanting and uplifting, making it perfect for romantic occasions. The lyrics express the joy and excitement of newfound love, creating a warm and joyful atmosphere. This track is a delightful addition to any romantic playlist, evoking feelings of happiness and affection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the delightful charm of Kannukulla Vandhu from the movie Kadalai. With Sam CS's enchanting vocals and captivating music, this song is a perfect blend of romance and melody. Dive into a world of love and joy with this unforgettable track.
stanzaMeanings: You come into my eyes and get stuck, girl. You come into my dreams and stand there, dear. You pick something from my heart, yeah yeah, tell me, girl.
You make me dizzy, girl. You make me go crazy, dear. Why do you make me shy, yeah yeah, tell me, girl.
I wish to be with you, my dear. I wish to talk with you. I wish to hold hands and walk together, wish, wish.
You come into my eyes and get stuck, girl. You come into my dreams and stand there, dear. You pick something from my heart, yeah yeah, tell me, girl.
I saw you, dear. I need you. Without you, my heart will break now.
I wish to talk with you, and when I do, my heart beats fast.
Oh.. when the moon rises, there's a weight in my heart. Seeing you once will make it better.
I wish to be with you, my dear. I wish to support your work. I wish to hold hands and walk together, wish, wish.
I enjoy your words and mischief without telling anyone.
When you don't look, I enjoy your happiness secretly.
You are like a long life in India. You are needed here. If time ends, even a curse will be with you.
I want to see dreams. I want to tell stories. A life together is enough.
You come and stand in my eyes, love. You get stuck in my heart. You make me think of you here, yeah yeah, I have changed. I have changed.
I wish to be with you, my dear. I wish to support your work. I wish to hold hands and walk together, wish, wish.
